name: metago-studio
description: MetaGO Studio - 可视化技能编排平台

scripts.predeploy: npm run build && node scripts/generate-spa-fallback.cjs && npm run verify
scripts.deploy:studio: npm run predeploy && tcb hosting deploy ./dist studio --env-id metago-d6gfw1e4rf2a5bcad
scripts.electron:dev: VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 concurrently "vite" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && electron ."
scripts.electron:build: vite build --config vite.electron.config.ts && tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('dist/electron/package.json','{\"type\":\"commonjs\"}')" && npx electron-builder --publish never
scripts.electron:build:win: vite build --config vite.electron.config.ts && tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && xcopy dist-electron dist\electron\ /E /I /Y && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('dist/electron/package.json','{\"type\":\"commonjs\"}')" && npx electron-builder --win --publish never
scripts.electron:build:mac: vite build --config vite.electron.config.ts && tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('dist/electron/package.json','{\"type\":\"commonjs\"}')" && npx electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.electron:build:linux: vite build --config vite.electron.config.ts && tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('dist/electron/package.json','{\"type\":\"commonjs\"}')" && npx electron-builder --linux --publish never
